## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change, code improvement only)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test coverage improvement

## Components Affected
- [ ] Laravel Backend (Controllers / Services / Models)
- [ ] Frontend (Blade / Alpine.js / Tailwind)
- [ ] ML Pipeline (Python / XGBoost / SHAP)
- [ ] Flask API
- [ ] LLM Integration (Gemini / Hints)
- [ ] Database (Migrations / Seeders)
- [ ] Documentation / README

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch is created from `develop` (not `main`)
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines (Pint / ESLint)
- [ ] Changes have been tested locally
- [ ] No files outside the scope of this PR have been modified
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys are included
